hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"REMINDER: If this turn results in any meaningful state change (file edits, new files, commits, branch ops, etc.) — whether from a typed prompt, plan approval, or other directive — update docs/PROMPT_HISTORY.md (clean, readable) and docs/PROMPT_HISTORY_ORIG.md (original wording with inline context clarifications). Redact personal and security-sensitive details. When work is part of an approved plan, reference the plan filename in the entry."}}'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"PLAN APPROVED: Copy the plan file to docs/plans/ using the default plan filename. Also, when implementation of this plan is complete, create a deviations doc in docs/plans/ documenting any differences between the plan and what was actually built, with explanations for why each deviation occurred."}}'
hooks.statusMessage: Plan approved — setting up plan docs...
